description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design, clad in light wood paneling. Large floor-to-ceiling windows dominate the front facade, providing ample natural light to the living spaces. The property includes a well-maintained green lawn, a swimming pool, and outdoor seating, with a mature tree and decorative shrubbery enhancing the landscape. A driveway leads to a parked car at the rear, and the house is surrounded by a simple, open yard. The structure appears to be single-story with a compact, efficient layout. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with flat roof, wood paneling, large windows, a pool, and landscaped yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, outdoor seating, pool, and a prominent tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wood paneling, glass doors, driveway, and car parked at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view with the car, smaller windows, and landscaping including a shrub and tree.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the long wooden facade, outdoor seating, and pool area with tree.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing windows and scattered side windows
